scripts.dev: sh -c 'bun run dev:cf & bun run dev:asset-service:remote & wait'
scripts.build: bun run i18n:build && sync && vite build
scripts.db:dump:local: TIMESTAMP=$(date +'%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S') && OUTPUT_FILE=sql/backup/hype-db-local-${TIMESTAMP}.sql && DB_FILE=$(ls -t .wrangler/state/v3/d1/miniflare-D1DatabaseObject/*.sqlite 2>/dev/null | grep -v 'metadata.sqlite' | head -1) && sqlite3 "$DB_FILE" '.dump' > ${OUTPUT_FILE} && echo "✅ Exported to ${OUTPUT_FILE}" && sql/processing/sql_dump_to_ordered_backup.sh ${OUTPUT_FILE} sql/backup/hype-db-local-${TIMESTAMP}-ordered.sql && echo "✅ Reordered to sql/backup/hype-db-local-${TIMESTAMP}-ordered.sql"
scripts.db:dump:cf:preview: TIMESTAMP=$(date +'%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S') && OUTPUT_FILE=sql/backup/hype-db-preview-${TIMESTAMP}.sql && bunx wrangler d1 export hype-db-preview --remote --output=${OUTPUT_FILE} && echo "✅ Exported to ${OUTPUT_FILE}" && sql/processing/sql_dump_to_ordered_backup.sh ${OUTPUT_FILE} sql/backup/hype-db-preview-${TIMESTAMP}-ordered.sql && echo "✅ Reordered to sql/backup/hype-db-preview-${TIMESTAMP}-ordered.sql"
scripts.db:dump:cf:prod: TIMESTAMP=$(date +'%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S') && OUTPUT_FILE=sql/backup/hype-db-prod-${TIMESTAMP}.sql && bunx wrangler d1 export hype-db-prod --remote --output=${OUTPUT_FILE} && echo "✅ Exported to ${OUTPUT_FILE}" && sql/processing/sql_dump_to_ordered_backup.sh ${OUTPUT_FILE} sql/backup/hype-db-prod-${TIMESTAMP}-ordered.sql && echo "✅ Reordered to sql/backup/hype-db-prod-${TIMESTAMP}-ordered.sql"
scripts.db:reset:local: bunx wrangler d1 execute hype-db-local --file=sql/routines/reset_db.sql && echo "✅ Local database reset complete"
scripts.db:reset:preview: bunx wrangler d1 execute hype-db-preview --remote --file=sql/routines/reset_db.sql && echo "✅ Preview database reset complete"
scripts.db:restore:latest:prod: LATEST_FILE=$(ls -t sql/backup/hype-db-prod-*-ordered.sql 2>/dev/null | head -1) && if [ -n "$LATEST_FILE" ]; then sql/processing/restore_local_backup.sh "$LATEST_FILE"; else echo "❌ No ordered prod backup files found"; fi
scripts.db:restore:latest:prod:to:preview: LATEST_FILE=$(ls -t sql/backup/hype-db-prod-*-ordered.sql 2>/dev/null | head -1) && if [ -n "$LATEST_FILE" ]; then bunx wrangler d1 execute hype-db-preview --remote --file="$LATEST_FILE" && echo "✅ Restored from $LATEST_FILE"; else echo "❌ No ordered prod backup files found"; fi
scripts.db:restore:latest:preview: LATEST_FILE=$(ls -t sql/backup/hype-db-preview-*-ordered.sql 2>/dev/null | head -1) && if [ -n "$LATEST_FILE" ]; then sql/processing/restore_local_backup.sh "$LATEST_FILE"; else echo "❌ No ordered preview backup files found"; fi
scripts.db:seed:eln-test-tasks:local: bunx wrangler d1 execute hype-db-local --file=sql/routines/reset_eln_test_tasks.sql && echo "✅ ELN test tasks reset complete"
scripts.db:migration:run:local: bunx wrangler d1 migrations apply hype-db-local
scripts.db:migration:run:cf:prod: bunx wrangler d1 migrations apply hype-db-prod --remote --env production
scripts.db:migration:run:cf:preview: bunx wrangler d1 migrations apply hype-db-preview --remote --env preview
scripts.db:mirror:prod:to:local: bun run db:dump:cf:prod && bun run db:restore:latest:prod && bun run db:sync:map:styles:local
scripts.db:mirror:prod:to:preview: bun run db:dump:cf:prod && bun run db:reset:preview && bun run db:restore:latest:prod:to:preview
scripts.render:map:styles: bun run i18n:build && bun run scripts/generate-map-style-renders.ts
scripts.render:map:styles:init: bun run i18n:build && bun run scripts/generate-map-style-renders.ts --force
scripts.test:run: bun run i18n:build && sync && vitest run --config=vitest.config.ts
scripts.test:run:verbose: bun run i18n:build && sync && vitest run --config=vitest.config.ts --reporter=verbose
scripts.test:run:metrics: bun run i18n:build && sync && vitest run --config=vitest.config.ts --reporter=default
scripts.test:watch: bun run i18n:build && sync && vitest watch --config=vitest.config.ts
